title: senecio subradiatus
intro: Senecio subradiatus, also known as the New Zealand fireweed, is a perennial plant species native to New Zealand. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Senecio subradiatus include its potential to reduce inflammation, alleviate pain, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. Herbal preparations of Senecio subradiatus can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to support respiratory health and reduce inflammation.
